Elizabethtown, Kentucky

Mini golf,
food, fun &
great drinks.

Elizabethtown's favorite outdoor destination. 18-hole course, game yard, rooftop bar, food truck, and a private party room — all in one place.

On the course

18-Hole Mini Golf

Adult

$13 per round

Ages 11+. Includes a full 18-hole round with putter and ball. Perfect for date nights, groups, and competitive putters.

Most Popular

Junior

$11 per round

Ages 5–10. A full round of fun on our 18-hole course — putter and ball included. Great for kids getting into the game.

Always Free

Little Ones

Free

Ages 4 & under play free! Bring the whole family without worry — the littlest putters are always on us.

Putters & balls included
All ages welcome
Off I-65, easy parking
Rooftop views of the course

Beyond the greens

Game Yard

Cornhole

Classic lawn game fun for all ages. Great for team vs. team competition.

Ping Pong

Full-size tables for casual rallies or fierce grudge matches.

Giant Jenga

Oversized wooden blocks for high-stakes, nerve-wracking fun outdoors.

Trash Can Pong

A Heartland original twist on a backyard classic. Great for groups.

More Games

Rotating selection of yard games — always something new to try.

Soft-serve ice cream, yard games, and great company — the game yard has it all.

Eat & Drink

Food & Bar

Food Truck

Full Menu, Outdoors

Our on-site food truck brings a full menu of fresh, made-to-order food right to the course. Dine al fresco while you watch the action.

21+ Elizabethtown's only rooftop bar — with a view of the full course.
Bar

Full Bar

Craft cocktails, cold beer, and more. Available for guests 21+.

Treats

Soft-Serve Ice Cream

Classic soft serve with a variety of toppings — perfect after 18 holes.

Rooftop bar open during regular hours. Must be 21+ with valid ID.

Private Events

Book the Par-Tee Room

Perfect for birthday parties, corporate outings, bachelor/bachelorette parties, and more. Our private room overlooks the course and comes fully equipped.

Course-overlook views
3 flat-screen TVs
Indoor bartop seating
Food service tables
By appointment only

Elizabethtown's favorite outdoor entertainment destination. Just off I-65 — easy to find, hard to leave.
